name: 假車禍裝可憐
description: 假千金在真千金回家當天謊稱遭遇車禍（實為被兒童滑板車嚇到），企圖將全家注意力從真千金身上轉移。這一行為集中體現了白蓮花的操控手段——用示弱來搶佔道德高地。
tags: 全家慌亂趕往醫院vs真千金獨自被冷落的對比畫面

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Mom, Qingwan was in a car accident. / She was nearly hit by a child's scooter while taking a walk in the neighborhood. / She wasn't injured, just a little frightened. / She wasn't injured and yet she had the nerve to say it was a car accident.
examples.context: 全家慌亂趕往醫院vs真千金獨自被冷落的對比畫面
